productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Strip Blue Ties
description: Classic to the hilt and smart to look at, this navy blue tie from indigo nation comes with self ribs that lend it a sophisticated look, making it a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has horizontal ribs towards the end of the broad tongue, thin diagonal ribs along the middle, and plain fabric alternating with horizontal ribs towards the end of the narrow tongue One loop with brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
